mapper.sql: id as id , pack_id as packId , create_time as createTime, config_id as configId , pack_num as packNum , bat_num as batNum , voltage as voltage , resistance as resistance , temperature as temperature , bcapacity as bcapacity
mapper.select:
select
from stat_battery_bat pack
and strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', pack.create_time) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', #{startDateTime})
and strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', pack.create_time) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', #{endDateTime})
and pack_id in
#{item}
mapper.insert:
insert into stat_battery_bat ( pack_id , create_time , config_id , pack_num , bat_num , voltage , resistance , temperature , bcapacity ) values
( #{item.packId} , datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), #{item.configId} , #{item.packNum} , #{item.batNum} , #{item.voltage} , #{item.resistance} , #{item.temperature} , #{item.bcapacity} )
mapper.delete:
delete from stat_battery_bat where config_id = #{configId}
and pack_num = #{packNum}
